title: parinari campestris
intro: Parinari campestris is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the desert raisin or bush raisin, native to Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Parinari campestris include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Parinari campestris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional bush foods as a sweet and nutritious ingredient.
